scores.correctness_notes: Covers all events from the gold standard including lifecycle, leader, relation, storage, container/pebble, secret, action, and deprecated series upgrade hooks. Missing collect_metrics (deprecated) but otherwise complete.
scores.hallucination_notes: PreSeriesUpgradeEvent and PostSeriesUpgradeEvent are listed as separate named event classes, but the gold standard only lists pre_series_upgrade/post_series_upgrade as a pair without specifying distinct class names. Minor uncertainty but not clearly fabricated. collect_metrics event is omitted but not hallucinated.
